resolution: DESIGN revised to @v:1.2: frozen/read-only author-disjoint holdout (loop cannot write it); per-suite advisory gate (legacy until provisioned); host-derived authority; inert reframed as storage hygiene; module ownership + expanded determinism test. @v:1.3: cross-model role-disjointness (CrossModelRoles) added from cm_test capability evidence (operator-approved 2026-06-19) -> lifts the v1.2 single-runtime residual to a multi-runtime mechanism

model-gating must be principled (ReDoS guard v3)
